{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Iteration 300: Vesper
| introduced = Waybound
}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Iteration]] 300 is named [[Vesper]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c1">''Waybound'', chapter 1</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle locations]]
[[Category:Otherworldly locations]]
